stemHtml: Considering the effect of density on VMCG only, How does a high-altitude runway affect the V1, the take-off distance, and the landing distance?

options.a: V<sub>1</sub> – decreases; take-off distance – increases; landing distance – increases.
options.b: V<sub>1</sub> – decreases; take-off distance – decreases; landing distance – decreases.
options.c: V<sub>1</sub> – increases; take-off distance – decreases; landing distance – decreases.
options.d: V1 – increases; take-off distance – increases; landing distance – increases.
